Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Milestones.Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO VETERANS, HOMELAND SECURITY AND MILITARY AFFAIRS

Title: Creates a women veterans history trail
Summary: Creates a women veterans history trail in order to recognize and celebrate the history of women in service.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the veterans' services law, in relation to creating a women veterans history trail in order to recognize and celebrate the history of women in service
